data.name: Pleasure Airlines
data.detailed_description:
Pleasure Airlines is a visual novel developed by the Kavorka team. In this story, you are in a 15 hour flight with your cute best friend, a sexy flight attendant, a beautiful pilot and an interesting food cart man. It’s a long flight, and anything can happen.
  • 3 dateable waifus and 1 husbando.
  • 4 different endings.
  • Erotic comedy.

Gameplay


  • Choices matter in the character affection.
  • Erotic scenes with the character of your affection.
  • Different endings based on your choices.

data.short_description: Erotic adventure in the hottest flight ever!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (64 bit)
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1920x1080
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:

  • 作業系統: OS X 10.9
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU

  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
